## Summary

<!-- What changed? -->

## Why

<!-- Why is this change needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / packaging
- [ ] Test only

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test run

## Docs impact

- [ ] No user-facing docs change
- [ ] `README.md` updated
- [ ] `docs/` updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Safety review

- [ ] No verify execution behavior changed
- [ ] Verify/security behavior changed and is documented
- [ ] No private path, private repo, or organization-specific assumption added

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] PR title is release-note friendly
